name: Zurich/Luzern/Zug Weekly Events Scout
schedule: Every Sunday at 18:00 Europe/Zurich (16:00 UTC in summer CEST, 17:00 local in winter CET)

categories.comedy: Famous English-speaking stand-up comedians with international recognition
categories.megastars: Globally A-list music artists (household names worldwide)
categories.nancy_ajram: Any Nancy Ajram appearance in Switzerland
categories.classical: World-class classical soloists, orchestras, and ballet companies

mcp_connections.purpose: Persist zurich-events-tracker.json to track new vs previously flagged events across weeks

persistence.description: JSON array of all previously found events. Used each week to classify events as NEW vs PREVIOUSLY FLAGGED and to sort the email accordingly.
